languages.text: "Чутье подсказывает, что все эти теории — комиссарские речи. Тут иное. Что-то, связанное с вашим прибытием, Ваша Светлость".
"My gut tells me that all these theories are just Commissar words. This is something else. Something to do with your arrival on Zarkov, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."
languages.original_text: "Чутье подсказывает, что все эти теории — комиссарские речи. Тут иное. Что-то, связанное с вашим прибытием, Ваша Светлость".

traits.locale_text: "My gut tells me that all these theories are just Commissar words. This is something else. Something to do with your arrival on Zarkov, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."
"My gut tells me that all these theories are just Commissar words. This is something else. Something to do with your arrival on Zarkov, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."
"My gut tells me that all these theories are just Commissar words. This is something else. Something to do with your arrival on Zarkov, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."

languages.text: 「私の直感では、これらの理論はすべてコミッサーの言葉に過ぎない。これは別のことだ。あなたのザルコフへの到着と関係がある」
languages.original_text: "My gut tells me that all these theories are just Commissar words. This is something else. Something to do with your arrival on Zarkov, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."

traits.locale_text: 「私の直感では、これらの理論はすべて commissar の言葉に過ぎない。これは別のことだ。あなたのザルコフへの到着と関係がある。」

languages.text: «Mi instinto me dice que esas teorías son palabras de Comisario. Esto es otra cosa. Algo relacionado con su llegada a Zarkov, mi{mf|lord|lady}».
languages.original_text: "My gut tells me that all these theories are just Commissar words. This is something else. Something to do with your arrival on Zarkov, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."

traits.locale_text: «Mi instinto me dice que esas teorías son palabras de Comisario. Esto es otra cosa. Algo relacionado con su llegada a Zarkov, mi{mf|lord|lady}».

languages.text: “直觉告诉我，这些理论听起来更像是政委的空话，其中另有隐情……恐怕与您驾临扎尔科夫一事有关，大人。”
languages.original_text: "My gut tells me that all these theories are just Commissar words. This is something else. Something to do with your arrival on Zarkov, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."

traits.locale_text: “直觉告诉我，这些理论听起来更像是政委的空话，其中另有隐情……恐怕与您驾临扎尔科夫一事有关，大人。”

languages.text: "Mein Bauch sagt mir, dass all diese Theorien nichts als Kommissarsgeschwätz sind. Das hier ist etwas anderes. Etwas, das mit Eurer Ankunft auf Zarkov zu tun hat, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}."
languages.original_text: "My gut tells me that all these theories are just Commissar words. This is something else. Something to do with your arrival on Zarkov, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."

traits.locale_text: "Mein Bauch sagt mir, dass all diese Theorien nichts als Kommissarsgeschwätz sind. Das hier ist etwas anderes. Etwas, das mit Eurer Ankunft auf Zarkov zu tun hat, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}."

languages.text: "İçimden bir ses, tüm bu teorilerin Komiser laflarından ibaret olduğunu söylüyor. Bu başka bir şey. Zarkov'a varışınızla ilgili bir şey {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri."
languages.original_text: "My gut tells me that all these theories are just Commissar words. This is something else. Something to do with your arrival on Zarkov, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."

traits.locale_text: "İçimden bir ses, tüm bu teorilerin Komiser laflarından ibaret olduğunu söylüyor. Bu başka bir şey. Zarkov'a varışınızla ilgili bir şey {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri."

languages.text: « Mon instinct me souffle que ces théories ne sont que des paroles de commissaire. Il y a autre chose, et je pense que c'est lié à votre arrivée sur Zarkov, Votre Seigneurie. »
languages.original_text: "My gut tells me that all these theories are just Commissar words. This is something else. Something to do with your arrival on Zarkov, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."

traits.locale_text: « Mon instinct me souffle que ces théories ne sont que des paroles de commissaire. Il y a autre chose, et je pense que c'est lié à votre arrivée sur Zarkov, Votre Seigneurie. »
